DP.196.0046:
Enables the user to
perform first in the
next turn.
DP.196.0047:
Enables the user to
perform last in the
next turn.
DP.196.0048:
Earn +2 for each
time the same Judge
is chosen.
DP.196.0049:
Earn +2 if the
Judge’s Voltage goes
up.
DP.196.0050:
A basic performance
using a move known
by the Pokémon.
DP.196.0051:
Earn +3 if no other
Pokémon has chosen
the same Judge.
DP.196.0052:
Allows performance
of the same move
twice in a row.
DP.196.0053:
Increased Voltage is
added to the
performance score.
DP.196.0054:
Earn +15 if all the
Pokémon choose the
same Judge.
DP.196.0055:
Lowers the Voltage
of all Judges by one
each.
DP.196.0056:
Earn double the
score in the next
turn.
DP.196.0057:
Steals the Voltage
of the Pokémon that
just went.
DP.196.0058:
Prevents the Voltage
from going up in the
same turn.
DP.196.0059:
Makes the order of
contestants random
in the next turn.
DP.196.0060:
Earns double the
score on the final
performance.
DP.196.0061:
Raises the score if
the Voltage is low.
DP.196.0062:
Earn +2 if the
Pokémon performs
first in the turn.
DP.196.0063:
Earn +2 if the
Pokémon performs
last in the turn.
DP.196.0064:
Prevents the Voltage
from going down in
the same turn.
DP.196.0065:
Earn +3 if two
Pokémon raise the
Voltage in a row.
DP.196.0066:
Earn a higher score
the later the
Pokémon performs.
DP.196.0067:
Earn +3 if the
Pokémon that just
went hit max Voltage.
DP.196.0068:
Earn +3 if the
Pokémon gets the
lowest score.
